title: Netfix’s Shonen Anime Hits Major Manga Milestone
content: When it comes to anime, Netflix has been working to carve out a place for the streaming service in the ever-growing medium. While housing plenty of classic franchises such as Jujutsu Kaisen, Death Note, Attack on Titan , and more, the platform has created plenty of original anime of its own.
author: ComicBook

title: Disgaea Mayhem Spinoff Game's Trailer Reveals July 23 Release in West
content: NIS America announced on Friday that it will release Nippon Ichi Software 's Disgaea Mayhem ( Kyо̄ran Makaism ) game in the West as a spinoff in its Disgaea franchise for Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 5, and PC via Steam on July 23.
author: ANN

title: Manga Up! Global Releases It's Not Easy Being Cute, Slasher Maidens, Inuta Manga in English
content: Manga UP! describes It's Not Easy Being Cute : College student Himesaki Nozomi was a girl who took her beauty into her own hands through plastic surgery. One day she was asked by the natural beauty Tennōji Ruka to teach her how to be “cute.” At first, Nozomi was irked by her ignorance.
author: ANN

title: Pokémon Horizons Anime Reveals New Character, Theme Songs for 'Wonder Voyage' Arc
content: The staff of the Pokémon: Horizons anime revealed on Friday a new character and theme songs for the new "Wonder Voyage" arc . The protagonists' voice actresses Minori Suzuki (as Liko) and Yuka Terasaki (as Roy) perform the new opening theme song "Sekai Tsunagare," produced by HoneyWorks .
author: ANN

title: Amphibia Creator Talks Long-Awaited Sequel
content: Disney might be best known for its feature-length films and its sprawling amusement parks, but the studio has also made a big name for itself when it comes to animated television series.
author: ComicBook

title: Tappytoon Wins Webby People's Voice Award
content: Contents First announced on Wednesday that its global webtoon platform Tappytoon has won the Webby People's Voice Award in the Entertainment, Sports & Events category (Apps, Software & Immersive) at the 30th Annual Webby Awards.
author: ANN

title: 5th Girls und Panzer das Finale Film Streams Teaser Video
content: Bandai Namco Filmworks began streaming on Friday a teaser video for the fifth film in the six-part Girls und Panzer das Finale film series The Girls und Panzer television anime premiered in October 2012 and had 12 episodes. The Girls und Panzer der Film anime film followup opened in Japan in November 2015.
author: ANN

title: The Player Who Can't Level Up Webtoon's Game Adaptation Debuts Playable Demo on Steam
content: The video game adaptation of the hit webtoon The Player Who Can't Level Up released its first playable demo on Steam on Thursday. Tripearl Games is developing and Smilegate is publishing the 3D action roguelite game.
author: ANN

title: Emaqi Releases Izakaya of Extinct Animals, The Gene of AI, More Manga in English
content: AI localization company Orange Inc. announced on Friday that it will release the following manga titles in English on its e-bookstore service " emaqi " on the following dates: emaqi also stated it released volume 2 of Nobuyuki Takahashi 's Parallel Leap Syndrome manga and volume 10 of Kenichi Okuyama's The Morning…
author: ANN

title: Carnby Kim, Youngchan Hwang Return With New Thriller Webtoon Copycat
content: Acclaimed thriller creators Carnby Kim and Youngchan Hwang have made their return to WEBTOON with a new series titled COPYCAT , which debuted on April 14 in English. The series debuted in Korean on January 6. Known for hit titles such as Bastard and Sweet Home , the duo have built a reputation for crafting thrillers.
author: ANN
